meta.title: Wound Care Center Software | Healing Progression & HBO Coordination | clinIQ
meta.description: Complete guide to wound care center operations. Wound measurement tracking. HBO treatment coordination. Advanced therapy authorization. Healing rate analytics.

hero.subhead: Your wounds need systematic measurement and tracking. Your HBO treatments need coordination. Your advanced therapies need authorization. clinIQ tracks wound healing, coordinates hyperbaric oxygen, and manages advanced wound care.

sections.content:
Wound care centers manage complex chronic wounds requiring systematic measurement, multiple treatment modalities, and long-term follow-up.

**The measurement documentation burden:**

Every wound measured at every visit. Length, width, depth, undermining, tissue types, drainage. Documentation is intensive but essential for outcomes and billing.

**The HBO coordination:**

Hyperbaric oxygen therapy requires chamber scheduling, dive protocols, and treatment tracking across 20-40 session courses.

**What clinIQ tracks:**

Dimensions: Length, width, depth, area, volume calculated.

Tissue characteristics: Granulation, slough, eschar, epithelialization percentages.

Wound bed: Drainage amount and type, odor, periwound condition.

Photography: Wound photos with measurement overlay.

**Healing progression:**

Size over time graphed. Healing rate calculated. Stalled wounds flagged for treatment escalation.

Hyperbaric oxygen therapy involves 20-40+ treatments.

**What clinIQ does:**

Treatment course tracking: Treatments completed, treatments remaining, protocol compliance.

Chamber scheduling: Dive schedule coordination.

Pre-dive checklist: Blood glucose, medications, contraindication screening.

Outcome documentation: Response to HBO documented.

Advanced wound therapies (cellular/tissue products, NPWT, growth factors) require authorization.

**What clinIQ does:**

Auth tracking: Status per patient per therapy.

Treatment failure documentation: Prior treatment documented for step therapy.

Application tracking: Product applied, response documented.

Wound care outcomes depend on systematic tracking.

**What clinIQ provides:**

Healing rate: Percent area reduction over time.

Benchmarking: Expected vs actual healing rate.

Outcome reporting: Healing rates by wound type, by etiology, by treatment.

**Week 1-2:** Wound tracking, HBO coordination, advanced therapy management configured.

**ROI:** Improved healing rates. Better authorization outcomes. Enhanced billing capture.

**Investment:** Professional $499/month. Implementation $750 one-time.

faqs.q: How do you track wound measurements?
faqs.a: Dimensions at every visit with healing progression graphed. Stalled wounds flagged.
Yes. Treatment course tracking, chamber scheduling, pre-dive checklists.
